name: switchboard-router
description: Switchboard CLI — local AI routing gateway (install: npm i -g switchboard-router; run: switchboard)

scripts.dev: nodemon -I --watch cli.js --watch src --watch hooks --ext js,json cli.js

comment_sqlite: sql.js + better-sqlite3 are NOT bundled here. They are installed into ~/.switchboard/runtime/node_modules by hooks/postinstall.js (and re-checked at runtime by cli.js). This avoids Windows EBUSY errors when updating the global CLI, since native .node files no longer live under the locked install dir.
comment_systray: System tray uses platform-specific optionalDependencies (esbuild pattern). npm installs only the matching binary for the user's OS/arch. Windows uses PowerShell NotifyIcon (zero binary). Postinstall fallback downloads from GitHub releases if optionalDeps are skipped.
